subject: A winged angelic figure kneeling in prayer in a dark forest, her wings and body being overtaken by writhing tendrils and corrupting growths that emerge from the surrounding trees
description: A pale, robed angel kneels in a shadowed forest clearing, hands clasped in prayer, her broad feathered wings spread behind her. Twisting, tentacular tendrils — pink, red, and sickly organic — sprout from the dark trees around her and reach in toward her body, threading through her wings and back as if corrupting her from within. The forest is rendered in deep greens and blacks with mossy ground, while the corrupting growths glow in warm reds and fleshy pinks against the cool palette, creating a stark tonal clash between the holy figure and the alien infestation overtaking her.
foreground: kneeling winged angel with tendrils piercing her wings and body
background: dark forest with twisted trees sprouting tentacular growths
emotion: devotional surrender being overtaken by horror; the figure prays even as she is consumed
